strengths: Extensive fullstack experience across multiple languages and frameworks (TypeScript, React, Node.js, etc.)
Deep expertise in scalable architectures, including Kubernetes, AWS, and CI/CD pipelines
Proven track record of building and maintaining complex systems in renewable energy-adjacent domains
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, with 15+ years of senior-level experience
Lacks direct PostgreSQL experience mentioned in the job description
Limited recent focus on clean software architecture in renewable energy/construction technology
response.justification: Bogdan’s profile demonstrates exceptional fullstack expertise with strong TypeScript, React, and system design skills, but his senior-level experience and lack of PostgreSQL exposure may create misalignment with the junior/mid-level role’s requirements. His background in scalable platforms and automation tools is highly relevant, though his focus has been broader than renewable energy/construction technology.
